title: Crispy Zanzibari Chicken Thighs Stir-fry
description: A tangy, crisp, indulgent Middle Eastern dish featuring chicken thighs that can be enjoyed as a vegetarian-friendly snack option.
instructions: Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces. Season with salt and pepper.
In a pan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Sear chicken for about 5 minutes on each side until golden brown. Transfer to an oven-safe dish.

While cooking chicken, mince garlic finely and slice green chilies. In the same pan, sauté minced garlic and chopped onions until translucent. Add sliced green chilies and tomatoes, stir-fry for another minute.
Add seasoned chicken pieces into the pan with vegetables, mix well. Pour in lemon juice (half a cup), olive oil, and sprinkle cinnamon powder over the mixture. Stir evenly.

Transfer all ingredients to the preheated oven-safe dish, cover with foil and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes. Uncover and continue baking for another 7-8 minutes until chicken thighs are crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
